proofCards.title: The shortlist is earned
proofCards.body: Every crop must survive season, soil, water, pressure, and floor-profit checks before it can appear.

proofCards.title: Blocked crops still stay visible
proofCards.body: Crowded lanes like paddy or turmeric still show price and downside, so the market is visible even when the answer is no.

proofCards.title: This is more than a market board
proofCards.body: Prices stay visible, but so do crowding, downside, and the exact reason one crop survives while another does not.

filterTrace.title: Season gate
filterTrace.note: Kharif crops only. Out-of-season crops are removed before scoring starts.

filterTrace.title: Soil filter
filterTrace.note: Only crops compatible with Deep Calcareous soil survive.

filterTrace.title: Water + weather filter
filterTrace.note: Water source is Mixed. Rainfall, drought, and flood risk are checked here.

filterTrace.title: District cap filter
filterTrace.note: This is the anti-rat-race layer. The bot avoids recommending crops that are already crowding the district.

filterTrace.title: Floor-price survivability
filterTrace.note: Only crops that stay profitable even at conservative floor prices make the final list.

demoScenarios.teluguReply:
Naanna, naanu 10 acres, deep_calcareous soil, mixed water — anni crops analyse chesanu.

BEST CHOICE — మొక్కజొన్న (MAIZE):
  Rate range: floor ₹1,600 / avg ₹2,219 / ceiling ₹3,000 per quintal
  Meeru 10 acres ki expected profit: ₹398,309
  Worst case profit: ₹252,720
  Appu pressure tharvatha migiledi: ₹222,720
  District lo: chala mandhi vestunnaru — risk ekkuva

SECOND OPTION — సోయాబీన్ (SOYBEAN):
  Rate range: floor ₹3,600 / avg ₹5,032 / ceiling ₹6,200
  Expected profit: ₹342,472
  Worst case: ₹216,170

Naanu guarantee ivvaleddu — market ela marustundo teliyadam ledu.
Ee numbers data cheptunnai. Last word meeru — meeru feel cheppandi.
Inka edaina doubt unte naaku cheppandi.

conversation.speaker: bot
conversation.text: Mee soil type enti? Water source enti? Udaharanaki: black cotton, borewell.

conversation.speaker: bot
conversation.text: Last 3 crops emi vesaru? Loan unda? Udaharanaki: paddy, turmeric, maize. Loan 2 lakh undi. Ledu ante 'no loan' ani cheppandi.

conversation.speaker: farmer
conversation.text: last crop paddy, loan 2 lakh undi

demoScenarios.teluguReply:
Naanna, naanu 5 acres, black_cotton soil, canal water — anni crops analyse chesanu.

BEST CHOICE — చెరకు (SUGARCANE):
  Rate range: floor ₹370 / avg ₹370 / ceiling ₹370 per quintal
  Meeru 5 acres ki expected profit: ₹381,160
  Worst case profit: ₹381,160
  Appu pressure tharvatha migiledi: ₹381,160
  District lo: cap daggara ki vachesthondi — careful ga decide cheyyali

SECOND OPTION — పత్తి (COTTON):
  Rate range: floor ₹4,800 / avg ₹6,430 / ceiling ₹9,500
  Expected profit: ₹302,184
  Worst case: ₹206,340

Naanu guarantee ivvaleddu — market ela marustundo teliyadam ledu.
Ee numbers data cheptunnai. Last word meeru — meeru feel cheppandi.
Inka edaina doubt unte naaku cheppandi.
